_note: Upset radar based on actual December 5, 2025 draw. Risk score 1–5. Update status/result as matches play out.

upsets.title: South Africa shock Mexico at the Azteca
upsets.reasoning: Mexico are heavy favorites at the sacred Estadio Azteca on opening day. But South Africa are organized, physical, and play with nothing to lose. The 2010 hosts know what a World Cup opening-match atmosphere feels like. Mexico's pressure could work against them.
keyFactors: Mexico under enormous home pressure at the Azteca
South Africa hosted 2010 — they know tournament atmospheres
Opening match nerves affect favorites more than underdogs
A draw would already be historic
upsets.upsetOdds: Low but genuine — could define the whole group

upsets.title: Egypt beat Belgium at Lumen Field
upsets.reasoning: Belgium are favorites, but Mo Salah in his final World Cup is one of the world's most dangerous attackers. Belgium's golden generation is aging. Egypt are organized defensively and lethal on the break. June 15 at Lumen Field could be one of the biggest shocks of the group stage.
keyFactors: Mo Salah's last World Cup — expect maximum motivation
Belgium's best players are past peak — Lukaku, De Bruyne both 30+
Egypt have tactical discipline to sit deep and counter
First Seattle match of the tournament — unpredictable opener atmosphere
upsets.upsetOdds: Moderate — this match will go down to the wire

upsets.title: Morocco beat Brazil in Group C
upsets.reasoning: Morocco reached the 2022 World Cup semifinal. Brazil haven't won since 2002 and carry enormous psychological weight. This is the most high-profile group stage matchup of the tournament — 2022's most dramatic nation vs 2022's biggest disappointment. Morocco know how to beat anyone.
keyFactors: Morocco beat Portugal, Spain, and Belgium in 2022 — Brazil is not invincible
Brazil's defensive fragility in knockout situations
Morocco's compact tactical system neutralizes Brazil's individual quality
The 2022 connection — Morocco are no longer underdogs
upsets.upsetOdds: Moderate — this is the match of Group C

upsets.title: Scotland cause chaos in Group C
upsets.reasoning: Scotland haven't been at a World Cup since 1998 — 28 years of absence creates enormous emotional energy. They play with nothing to lose. Physical, direct, and dangerous on set pieces. A Brazil or Morocco scalp would be one of the all-time great World Cup moments.
keyFactors: 28-year wait creates irreplaceable motivation
Scotland dangerous on set pieces
Opponents may underestimate the emotional factor
Scotland have nothing to lose — Brazil and Morocco have everything
upsets.upsetOdds: Low — but Scotland will make it uncomfortable for whoever they play

upsets.title: Norway eliminate France from Group I
upsets.reasoning: Erling Haaland is the best striker in world football and this is his first senior World Cup. France are defending tournament runners-up. Norway have the individual talent to beat anyone on a given day. Haaland vs France could be the defining group stage encounter of the entire tournament.
keyFactors: Haaland in form — world-class striker at peak age (25) at his first WC
France's defensive vulnerabilities under pressure
Norway are not a one-man team — Ødegaard orchestrates
Group I is the toughest group in the draw — nobody is safe
upsets.upsetOdds: Moderate-high — this is genuinely 50/50 if Haaland fires

upsets.title: Algeria eliminate defending champions Argentina
upsets.reasoning: Argentina are defending champions but carry the weight of expectation. At 38, Messi cannot play every minute. Algeria are Africa's most experienced and physically imposing side. A defending champion group stage exit — with Messi's final World Cup ending early — would be the tournament's most devastating story.
keyFactors: Messi at 38 cannot carry the full load
Algeria AFCON quality and physical style
Post-championship complacency risk for Argentina
Jordan and Austria also capable of points
upsets.upsetOdds: Low — but the consequences would be enormous

upsets.title: Egypt vs Iran in Seattle — a draw that sends Iran through
upsets.reasoning: This is one of the most geopolitically charged matches in World Cup history, played at Lumen Field on a Friday night at 8pm. Iran are disciplined and hard to beat. A draw could send Iran through at Egypt's expense, ending Mo Salah's tournament in the group stage.
keyFactors: Night kickoff, sold-out Lumen Field — electric atmosphere
Iran famous for defensive organization
If Egypt drew vs Belgium and need a win here, the pressure is enormous
Political dimension adds weight to every moment
upsets.upsetOdds: Moderate — Iran are capable of grinding out a result

upsets.title: Curaçao stun Ivory Coast in their World Cup debut
upsets.reasoning: Curaçao are making their first-ever World Cup appearance — a nation of 150,000 people. Ivory Coast are their most beatable Group E opponent. Nothing-to-lose energy is real. Any Curaçao point would be a landmark moment for Caribbean football.
keyFactors: Nothing-to-lose energy from a first World Cup appearance
Ivory Coast may underestimate a Caribbean debutant
Curaçao have several Eredivisie-quality players
Any result becomes historic — motivation is total
upsets.upsetOdds: Very low — but this is exactly the kind of match where surprises happen
